title: blepharis refracta
intro: Blepharis refracta, also known as the iron-plume or blue beard, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Blepharis refracta include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Blepharis refracta is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion of the leaves, which can be consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
